```{r barplots }
  }
  
  results <- get(deparse(substitute(env_results_obj)))
  
  # Extract significant depth effects
  depth_sig <- which(results$diff_depth == TRUE)
  turbidity_sig <- which(results$diff_turbidity_std_rank == TRUE)
  
  # Create depth results
  depth_data <- data.frame()
  if(length(depth_sig) > 0) {
    depth_data <- data.frame(
      Analysis = "Environmental_Effects",
      Fraction = fraction_name,
      Taxonomic_Level = tax_level,
      Environmental_Variable = "Depth",
      Taxon = results$taxon[depth_sig],
      Log_Fold_Change = round(results$lfc_depth[depth_sig], 4),
      P_value = results$p_depth[depth_sig],
      Q_value = results$q_depth[depth_sig],
      Robust = results$passed_ss_depth[depth_sig],
      Direction = ifelse(results$lfc_depth[depth_sig] > 0, "Increases_with_depth", "Decreases_with_depth"),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  # Create turbidity results
  turbidity_data <- data.frame()
  if(length(turbidity_sig) > 0) {
    turbidity_data <- data.frame(
      Analysis = "Environmental_Effects",
      Fraction = fraction_name,
      Taxonomic_Level = tax_level,
      Environmental_Variable = "Turbidity",
      Taxon = results$taxon[turbidity_sig],
      Log_Fold_Change = round(results$lfc_turbidity_std_rank[turbidity_sig], 4),
      P_value = results$p_turbidity_std_rank[turbidity_sig],
      Q_value = results$q_turbidity_std_rank[turbidity_sig],
      Robust = results$passed_ss_turbidity_std_rank[turbidity_sig],
      Direction = ifelse(results$lfc_turbidity_std_rank[turbidity_sig] > 0, "Increases_with_turbidity", "Decreases_with_turbidity"),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }
  
  return(rbind(depth_data, turbidity_data))
}

# Extract significant results from available objects
sig_env_phylum_motile <- data.frame()
sig_env_phylum_sessile <- data.frame()

if(exists("motile_PHY_env_results")) {
  sig_env_phylum_motile <- extract_env_significant(motile_PHY_env_results, "Motile", "Phylum")
  cat("Extracted", nrow(sig_env_phylum_motile), "significant results for motile phyla\n")
}

if(exists("sessile_PHY_env_results")) {
  sig_env_phylum_sessile <- extract_env_significant(sessile_PHY_env_results, "Sessile", "Phylum")
  cat("Extracted", nrow(sig_env_phylum_sessile), "significant results for sessile phyla\n")
}

# Try alternative object names if the above don't exist
if(nrow(sig_env_phylum_motile) == 0 && exists("env_results_phylum_motile")) {
  sig_env_phylum_motile <- extract_env_significant(env_results_phylum_motile, "Motile", "Phylum")
  cat("Extracted", nrow(sig_env_phylum_motile), "significant results for motile phyla (alternative)\n")
}

if(nrow(sig_env_phylum_sessile) == 0 && exists("env_results_phylum_sessile")) {
  sig_env_phylum_sessile <- extract_env_significant(env_results_phylum_sessile, "Sessile", "Phylum")
  cat("Extracted", nrow(sig_env_phylum_sessile), "significant results for sessile phyla (alternative)\n")
}

# =============================================================================
# CREATE PLOTS FOR MOTILE FRACTION
# =============================================================================

cat("Creating environmental effect plots for motile fraction...\n")

# Turbidity effects - Motile
if(nrow(sig_env_phylum_motile) > 0) {
  
  motile_turbidity_plots <- create_environmental_phylum_barplots(
    physeq_obj = motile_physeq,
    significant_results = sig_env_phylum_motile,
    env_variable = "Turbidity",
    fraction_name = "Motile",
    y_margin = 0.2
  )
  
  if(!is.null(motile_turbidity_plots)) {
    ggsave("Motile_Turbidity_Phyla_Cividis.pdf", 
           motile_turbidity_plots$grid_plot,
           width = 16, height = 12, dpi = 300)
    cat("Saved: Motile_Turbidity_Phyla_Cividis.pdf\n")
  }
}

# Depth effects - Motile  
if(nrow(sig_env_phylum_motile) > 0) {
  
  motile_depth_plots <- create_environmental_phylum_barplots(
    physeq_obj = motile_physeq,
    significant_results = sig_env_phylum_motile,
    env_variable = "Depth",
    fraction_name = "Motile",
    y_margin = 0.2
  )
  
  if(!is.null(motile_depth_plots)) {
    ggsave("Motile_Depth_Phyla_Mako.pdf", 
           motile_depth_plots$grid_plot,
           width = 16, height = 12, dpi = 300)
    cat("Saved: Motile_Depth_Phyla_Mako.pdf\n")
  }
}

# =============================================================================
# CREATE PLOTS FOR SESSILE FRACTION
# =============================================================================

cat("Creating environmental effect plots for sessile fraction...\n")

# Turbidity effects - Sessile
if(nrow(sig_env_phylum_sessile) > 0) {
  
  sessile_turbidity_plots <- create_environmental_phylum_barplots(
    physeq_obj = sessile_physeq,
    significant_results = sig_env_phylum_sessile,
    env_variable = "Turbidity",
    fraction_name = "Sessile",
    y_margin = 0.2
  )
  
  if(!is.null(sessile_turbidity_plots)) {
    ggsave("Sessile_Turbidity_Phyla_Cividis.pdf", 
           sessile_turbidity_plots$grid_plot,
           width = 16, height = 12, dpi = 300)
    cat("Saved: Sessile_Turbidity_Phyla_Cividis.pdf\n")
  }
}

# Depth effects - Sessile
if(nrow(sig_env_phylum_sessile) > 0) {
  
  sessile_depth_plots <- create_environmental_phylum_barplots(
    physeq_obj = sessile_physeq,
    significant_results = sig_env_phylum_sessile,
    env_variable = "Depth",
    fraction_name = "Sessile",
    y_margin = 0.2
  )
  
  if(!is.null(sessile_depth_plots)) {
    ggsave("Sessile_Depth_Phyla_Mako.pdf", 
           sessile_depth_plots$grid_plot,
           width = 14, height = 6, dpi = 300)
    cat("Saved: Sessile_Depth_Phyla_Mako.pdf\n")
  }
}

# =============================================================================
# CREATE COMPARISON PLOTS
# =============================================================================

cat("Creating fraction comparison plots...\n")

# Create comparison plots if both motile and sessile data exist
if(nrow(sig_env_phylum_motile) > 0 && nrow(sig_env_phylum_sessile) > 0) {
  
  # Turbidity comparison
  turbidity_comparison <- create_fraction_comparison_plot(
    sig_env_phylum_motile, sig_env_phylum_sessile, "Turbidity"
  )
  
  if(!is.null(turbidity_comparison)) {
    ggsave("Fraction_Comparison_Turbidity_Effects_Final.pdf", turbidity_comparison,
           width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
    cat("Saved: Fraction_Comparison_Turbidity_Effects_Final.pdf\n")
  }
  
  # Depth comparison
  depth_comparison <- create_fraction_comparison_plot(
    sig_env_phylum_motile, sig_env_phylum_sessile, "Depth"
  )
  
  if(!is.null(depth_comparison)) {
    ggsave("Fraction_Comparison_Depth_Effects_Final.pdf", depth_comparison,
           width = 12, height = 8, dpi = 300)
    cat("Saved: Fraction_Comparison_Depth_Effects_Final.pdf\n")
  }
}

# =============================================================================
# SUMMARY
# =============================================================================

cat("\n=== ENVIRONMENTAL PLOTTING SUMMARY ===\n")
cat("Motile significant phyla:", nrow(sig_env_phylum_motile), "\n")
cat("Sessile significant phyla:", nrow(sig_env_phylum_sessile), "\n")

if(nrow(sig_env_phylum_motile) > 0) {
  cat("Motile phyla with effects:\n")
  print(sig_env_phylum_motile %>% select(Taxon, Environmental_Variable, Log_Fold_Change, Q_value, Robust))
}

if(nrow(sig_env_phylum_sessile) > 0) {
  cat("Sessile phyla with effects:\n")
  print(sig_env_phylum_sessile %>% select(Taxon, Environmental_Variable, Log_Fold_Change, Q_value, Robust))
}

cat("\nEnvironmental effects plotting completed!\n")
cat("Check your working directory for PDF files.\n")
```


# LFC take 2 12/4 simpler code - R should not crash
#part 1
```{r}
# RECOVERY SCRIPT - Reload essential 18S ANCOMBC objects from CSV files
# This is much safer than running the full analysis again
# STEP 1: Reload the significant results
cat("Loading significant results from CSV files...\n")

all_environmental_significant <- read.csv("all_environmental_significant_results_18S.csv")
cat("✓ Loaded all_environmental_significant:", nrow(all_environmental_significant), "rows\n")

# STEP 2: Load phyloseq object if saved
if(file.exists("ancombc_raw_counts_physeq_18S.RData")) {
  cat("Loading phyloseq object...\n")
  load("ancombc_raw_counts_physeq_18S.RData")
  cat("✓ Loaded phyloseq object\n")
} else {
  cat("⚠ Phyloseq RData file not found\n")
}

# STEP 3: Create the turbidity_data_18S object (the one we need for plotting)
cat("\nCreating turbidity_data_18S from all_environmental_significant...\n")

# Get taxonomy table for phylum mapping
if(exists("ancom_physeq")) {
  tax_table_df <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ancom_physeq))
  
  family_phylum_map <- tax_table_df %>%
    filter(!is.na(family) & family != "") %>%
    distinct(family, phylum) %>%
    mutate(
      family_clean = gsub("^f__", "", family),
      family_clean = gsub(";.*", "", family_clean),
      phylum_clean = gsub("^p__", "", phylum),
      phylum_clean = gsub(";.*", "", phylum_clean)
    ) %>%
    select(family_clean, phylum_clean)
  
  # Create turbidity_data_18S
  turbidity_data_18S <- all_environmental_significant %>%
    filter(Taxonomic_Level == "Family" & Environmental_Variable == "Turbidity") %>%
    mutate(Family_clean = Taxon) %>%
    left_join(family_phylum_map, by = c("Family_clean" = "family_clean")) %>%
    rename(Phylum = phylum_clean) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Phylum)) %>%
    mutate(Direction_simple = ifelse(Log_Fold_Change > 0, "Increases", "Decreases"))
  
  cat("✓ Created turbidity_data_18S:", nrow(turbidity_data_18S), "families\n")
  cat("  Phyla:", length(unique(turbidity_data_18S$Phylum)), "\n")
  cat("  Robust effects:", sum(turbidity_data_18S$Robust), "\n")
  
} else {
  cat("✗ Cannot create turbidity_data_18S without phyloseq object\n")
}

cat("\n=== RECOVERY COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("Objects now in environment:\n")
cat("- all_environmental_significant\n")
if(exists("ancom_physeq")) cat("- ancom_physeq\n")
if(exists("turbidity_data_18S")) cat("- turbidity_data_18S\n")
```

===============================
----- FUNCTIONAL ANALYSIS ----
==============================

## Functional Trait Analysis: Testing Feeding Strategy as Predictor of Turbidity Sensitivity

Overview
This section tests whether nutritional strategy predicts family-level turbidity responses using 18S ARMS metabarcoding data. The analysis assigns families to functional groups based on feeding mechanisms and tests for directional patterns in turbidity responses (ANCOMBC2 results).

Key Question
Do suspension feeding mechanisms predict sediment tolerance? Specifically, we test whether:
- Fine Dead-End Microfilterers (FDM; sponges) decrease with turbidity (low sediment tolerance)
- Active Dead-End Sieves (ADS; bivalves, barnacles) increase with turbidity (high sediment tolerance via particle rejection)

Required Input Data
1. **ANCOMBC2 results** from three fractions (All_Samples, Motile, Sessile):
   - `env_results_family_all`
   - `env_results_family_motile`
   - `env_results_family_sessile`
   
2. **Functional trait data** (`trait_data_v4`):
   - Must contain columns: `accepted_family`, `nutritional_strategy`, `phyllum`
   - Nutritional strategies use standardized abbreviations (e.g., FDM, ADS, WCP)

3. **Output directory** (optional): Set `output_dir` for saving results, defaults to current directory

What This Code Does
1. **Data preparation**: Cleans trait data, expands abbreviations, merges with ANCOMBC2 results
2. **Functional classification**: Creates binary indicators for 6 suspension feeder mechanisms + other feeding strategies
3. **Statistical analysis**: Calculates mean log-fold changes by functional group, tests against zero
4. **Visualization**: Generates figures with custom color schemes
5. **Export**: Saves summary tables (CSV) and figures (PDF)

Important Notes
- Analysis focuses on **All_Samples fraction** for main results (concordant with COI dataset)
- Functional groups with n<2 families are excluded from statistical tests (insufficient power)
- One photoautotroph outlier (Dumontiaceae, LFC=+1.09) is robust but idiosyncratic
- Large error bars reflect genuine ecological heterogeneity within functional groups, not statistical weakness

Output Files
- `functional_group_summary.csv` - Statistics for all functional groups
- `suspension_mechanism_summary.csv` - Detailed suspension feeder results
- `photoautotroph_subgroups.csv` - Coralline vs. non-coralline patterns
- `functional_groups_all.pdf` - Main figure showing all groups
- `suspension_mechanisms.pdf` - Detailed suspension feeder figure
- `fdm_vs_ads.pdf` - Key prediction test visualization
- `functional_analysis_combined.pdf` - Combined multipanel figure
```{r}
# ============ 1. LOAD AND PREPARE DATA ============

# Load trait data 
#trait_data_v4 <- read.csv("/Users/nicolepittoors/Documents/Documents - biscaya/Bioinformatics/ARMS_18S_LULU/FINAL_18S_Pipeline/trait_mapping_QC_v4.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Set output directory
#if(!exists("output_dir")) output_dir <- "/Users/nicolepittoors/Documents/Documents - biscaya/Bioinformatics/ARMS_18S_LULU/FINAL_18S_Pipeline/Taxa_Output_18S"


#library(dplyr)
#library(tidyr)
#library(stringr)
#library(ggplot2)
#library(patchwork)

# ============ PART 1: DATA PREPARATION ============

# 1.1: Clean trait data and expand abbreviations
abbr_to_full <- c(
  "DEP" = "Deposit_Feeder", "PHOT" = "Photoautotroph",
  "FDM" = "Fine_Dead_End_Microfilterer", "PRED" = "Predator",
  "SCAV" = "Scavenger", "ADS" = "Active_Dead-End_Sieve",
  "WCP" = "Weak_Ciliary_Pumper", "GRAZ" = "Grazer",
  "TPC" = "Truly_Passive_Collectors", "RNM" = "Renewable_Mucus_Net",
  "SYBP" = "Symbiotic_Photosynthesis", "RCF" = "Ram/Crossflow"
)

full_to_abbr <- c(
  "Deposit_Feeder" = "DEP", "Photoautotroph" = "PHOT",
  "Fine_Dead_End_Microfilterer" = "FDM", "Predator" = "PRED",
  "Scavenger" = "SCAV", "Active_Dead-End_Sieve" = "ADS",
  "Weak_Ciliary_Pumper" = "WCP", "Grazer" = "GRAZ",
  "Truly_Passive_Collectors" = "TPC", "Renewable_Mucus_Net" = "RNM",
  "Symbiotic_Photosynthesis" = "SYBP", "Ram/Crossflow" = "RCF",
  "Deposit_feeder" = "DEP", "Parasite" = "PARA",
  "Chemolithoautototroph" = "CHEM", "Unknown" = "UNK"
)

# Expand abbreviations
expand_strategy <- function(x) {
  if(is.na(x) || x == "" || x == "Unknown") return("Unknown")
  parts <- unlist(str_split(x, ";\\s*"))
  expanded <- sapply(parts, function(p) {
    if(p %in% names(abbr_to_full)) return(abbr_to_full[p])
    gsub("_feeder", "_Feeder", gsub("_photosynthesis", "_Photosynthesis", p))
  })
  paste(expanded, collapse = ";")
}

create_abbr <- function(x) {
  if(is.na(x) || x == "" || x == "Unknown") return("UNK")
  parts <- unlist(str_split(x, ";\\s*"))
  abbrs <- sapply(parts, function(p) {
    if(p %in% names(full_to_abbr)) return(full_to_abbr[p])
    return(toupper(substr(gsub("[^A-Za-z]", "", p), 1, 4)))
  })
  if(length(abbrs) > 1) paste(abbrs, collapse = "+") else abbrs[1]
}

# Add family_clean if missing
if(!"family_clean" %in% names(trait_data_v4)) {
  trait_data_v4 <- trait_data_v4 %>%
    mutate(family_clean = tolower(trimws(accepted_family)))
}

# Apply cleaning
trait_data_v4_cleaned <- trait_data_v4 %>%
  mutate(
    nutritional_strategy_full = sapply(nutritional_strategy, expand_strategy),
    nutritional_strategy_abbr = sapply(nutritional_strategy_full, create_abbr),
    primary_function = sapply(nutritional_strategy_full, function(x) {
      str_trim(unlist(str_split(x, ";"))[1])
    }),
    primary_function_abbr = sapply(primary_function, function(x) {
      if(x %in% names(full_to_abbr)) full_to_abbr[x] else "UNK"
    })
  )

# 1.2: Load and combine ANCOM-BC2 results from all fractions
env_results_all <- env_results_family_all %>%
  mutate(
    Fraction = "All_Samples",
    diff_turbidity_logical = as.logical(diff_turbidity_std_rank),
    passed_ss_logical = as.logical(passed_ss_turbidity_std_rank)
  )

env_results_motile_df <- env_results_family_motile %>%
  mutate(
    Fraction = "Motile",
    diff_turbidity_logical = as.logical(diff_turbidity_std_rank),
    passed_ss_logical = as.logical(passed_ss_turbidity_std_rank)
  )

env_results_sessile_df <- env_results_family_sessile %>%
  mutate(
    Fraction = "Sessile", 
    diff_turbidity_logical = as.logical(diff_turbidity_std_rank),
    passed_ss_logical = as.logical(passed_ss_turbidity_std_rank)
  )

full_ancom_results <- rbind(
  env_results_all, env_results_motile_df, env_results_sessile_df
) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    Taxon = taxon, Fraction,
    Log_Fold_Change = lfc_turbidity_std_rank,
    P_value = p_turbidity_std_rank,
    Q_value = q_turbidity_std_rank,
    Is_Significant = diff_turbidity_logical,
    Robust = passed_ss_logical
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Is_Significant = ifelse(is.na(Is_Significant), FALSE, Is_Significant),
    Robust = ifelse(is.na(Robust), FALSE, Robust),
    Direction = case_when(
      Log_Fold_Change > 0 ~ "Increases_with_turbidity",
      Log_Fold_Change < 0 ~ "Decreases_with_turbidity",
      TRUE ~ "No_change"
    ),
    family_clean = tolower(trimws(Taxon))
  )

# 1.3: Merge with trait data and add phylum
# Remove duplicates from trait data (keep first occurrence)
trait_data_v4_cleaned_unique <- trait_data_v4_cleaned %>%
  dplyr::distinct(family_clean, .keep_all = TRUE)

functional_all_families <- full_ancom_results %>%
  dplyr::left_join(trait_data_v4_cleaned_unique, by = "family_clean") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    final_phylum = coalesce(phyllum, case_when(
      str_detect(tolower(Taxon), "rhodophyta") ~ "Rhodophyta",
      str_detect(tolower(Taxon), "porifera") ~ "Porifera",
      str_detect(tolower(Taxon), "bryozoa") ~ "Bryozoa",
      str_detect(tolower(Taxon), "cnidaria") ~ "Cnidaria",
      str_detect(tolower(Taxon), "annelida") ~ "Annelida",
      str_detect(tolower(Taxon), "arthropoda") ~ "Arthropoda",
      str_detect(tolower(Taxon), "mollusca") ~ "Mollusca",
      str_detect(tolower(Taxon), "chordata") ~ "Chordata",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ))
  )

# ============ PART 2: CREATE FUNCTIONAL INDICATORS ============

functional_dataset <- functional_all_families %>%
  mutate(
    # Suspension feeders (6 mechanistic categories)
    is_FDM = case_when(
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Fine_Dead_End_Microfilterer") ~ 1,
      final_phylum == "Porifera" ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    is_ADS = case_when(
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Active_Dead-End_Sieve") ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    is_WCP = case_when(
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Weak_Ciliary_Pumper") ~ 1,
      final_phylum == "Bryozoa" ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    is_TPC = case_when(
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Truly_Passive_Collectors") ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    is_RNM = case_when(
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Renewable_Mucus_Net") ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    is_RCF = case_when(
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Ram/Crossflow") ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    is_any_suspension = case_when(
      is_FDM == 1 | is_ADS == 1 | is_WCP == 1 | 
      is_TPC == 1 | is_RNM == 1 | is_RCF == 1 ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    
    # Other feeding strategies
    is_deposit_feeder = case_when(
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Deposit_Feeder") ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    is_predator = case_when(
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Predator") ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    is_photoautotroph = case_when(
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Photoautotroph") ~ 1,
      final_phylum == "Rhodophyta" ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    is_grazer = case_when(
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Grazer") ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    is_scavenger = case_when(
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Scavenger") ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0
    ),
    is_parasite = case_when(
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Parasite") ~ 1, TRUE ~ 0
    )
  )

# ============ PART 3: STATISTICAL ANALYSIS ============

# 3.1: Summary statistics by functional group
functional_group_summary <- functional_dataset %>%
  filter(as.logical(Is_Significant), Fraction == "All_Samples") %>%
  group_by(primary_function_abbr) %>%
  summarise(
    n_families = n(),
    mean_lfc = mean(Log_Fold_Change),
    median_lfc = median(Log_Fold_Change),
    sd_lfc = sd(Log_Fold_Change),
    se_lfc = sd_lfc / sqrt(n_families),
    n_increase = sum(Direction == "Increases_with_turbidity"),
    n_decrease = sum(Direction == "Decreases_with_turbidity"),
    percent_decrease = round(n_decrease / n_families * 100, 1),
    # One-sample t-test against zero
    t_stat = ifelse(n_families > 1, mean_lfc / se_lfc, NA),
    p_value = ifelse(n_families > 1, 
                     2 * pt(-abs(t_stat), df = n_families - 1), NA),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(primary_function_abbr), primary_function_abbr != "UNK", n_families >= 2) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_lfc))

# 3.2: Suspension feeder detailed analysis
suspension_summary <- functional_dataset %>%
  dplyr::filter(as.logical(Is_Significant), Fraction == "All_Samples") %>%
  dplyr::select(Taxon, Log_Fold_Change, Direction, final_phylum,
         is_FDM, is_ADS, is_WCP, is_TPC, is_RNM, is_RCF) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(is_FDM, is_ADS, is_WCP, is_TPC, is_RNM, is_RCF),
               names_to = "suspension_type", values_to = "has_type") %>%
  dplyr::filter(has_type == 1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Suspension_Abbr = case_when(
      suspension_type == "is_FDM" ~ "FDM",
      suspension_type == "is_ADS" ~ "ADS",
      suspension_type == "is_WCP" ~ "WCP",
      suspension_type == "is_TPC" ~ "TPC",
      suspension_type == "is_RNM" ~ "RNM",
      suspension_type == "is_RCF" ~ "RCF"
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(Suspension_Abbr) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_lfc = mean(Log_Fold_Change),
    se_lfc = sd(Log_Fold_Change) / sqrt(n),
    n_decrease = sum(Direction == "Decreases_with_turbidity"),
    percent_decrease = round(n_decrease / n * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# 3.3: Photoautotroph subgroup analysis
photoautotroph_analysis <- functional_dataset %>%
  dplyr::filter(is_photoautotroph == 1, as.logical(Is_Significant), 
         Fraction == "All_Samples") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    is_coralline = Taxon %in% c("Hapalidiaceae", "Mesophyllumaceae", 
                                "Lithophyllaceae", "Corallinaceae")
  ) %>%
  group_by(is_coralline) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_lfc = mean(Log_Fold_Change),
    se_lfc = sd(Log_Fold_Change) / sqrt(n),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# ============ PART 4: VISUALIZATION ============

# Color schemes
phylum_color_map <- c(
  "Annelida" = "#60714E", "Arthropoda" = "#3B8C6E", 
  "Bryozoa" = "#5BBFB0", "Chordata" = "#408BA8",
  "Cnidaria" = "#594A9E", "Echinodermata" = "#A8B1D6",
  "Mollusca" = "#F69B9C", "Rhodophyta" = "#F16363",
  "Porifera" = "#F68C30", "Unknown" = "grey40"
)

suspension_colors <- c(
  "FDM" = "#F68C30", "ADS" = "#3B8C6E", "WCP" = "#5BBFB0",
  "TPC" = "#A8B1D6", "RNM" = "#408BA8", "RCF" = "#408BA8"
)

direction_colors <- c(
  "Increases_with_turbidity" = "#3B8C6E",
  "Decreases_with_turbidity" = "#F68C30"
)

# 4.1: Main functional groups plot
sig_functional_all <- functional_dataset %>%
  dplyr::filter(as.logical(Is_Significant), Fraction == "All_Samples")

plot_functional_groups <- functional_group_summary %>%
  mutate(
    Group_Type = ifelse(primary_function_abbr %in% c("FDM", "ADS", "WCP", "TPC", "RNM", "RCF"),
                       "Suspension Feeder", "Other")
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(primary_function_abbr, mean_lfc), 
             y = mean_lfc, fill = Group_Type)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, color = "black", size = 0.3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_lfc - se_lfc, 
                    ymax = mean_lfc + se_lfc),
                width = 0.3, size = 0.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("n=", n_families)), 
            hjust = ifelse(functional_group_summary$mean_lfc > 0, -0.3, 1.3),
            size = 3.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Suspension Feeder" = "#56B4E9", "Other" = "#E69F00")) +
  labs(title = "Functional Group Responses to Turbidity",
       x = "Functional Group", y = "Mean Log-Fold Change",
       fill = "Group Type") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# 4.2: Suspension feeders detailed
suspension_long <- functional_dataset %>%
  dplyr::filter(as.logical(Is_Significant), Fraction == "All_Samples") %>%
  dplyr::select(Taxon, Log_Fold_Change, Direction, is_FDM, is_ADS, is_WCP, 
         is_TPC, is_RNM, is_RCF) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(is_FDM, is_ADS, is_WCP, is_TPC, is_RNM, is_RCF),
               names_to = "type", values_to = "has") %>%
  dplyr::filter(has == 1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Category = gsub("is_", "", type))

plot_suspension <- suspension_long %>%
  left_join(suspension_summary, by = c("Category" = "Suspension_Abbr")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Category, mean_lfc), y = mean_lfc, fill = Category)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, color = "black") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_lfc - se_lfc, ymax = mean_lfc + se_lfc),
                width = 0.3) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0("n=", n)), vjust = -0.5, size = 4) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = suspension_colors) +
  labs(title = "Suspension Feeder Mechanisms",
       x = NULL, y = "Mean Log-Fold Change") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# 4.3: FDM vs ADS comparison
plot_fdm_ads <- suspension_long %>%
  dplyr::filter(Category %in% c("FDM", "ADS")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Category, y = Log_Fold_Change, fill = Category)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Direction), width = 0.2, size = 2.5, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = suspension_colors) +
  scale_color_manual(values = direction_colors) +
  labs(title = "FDM vs ADS: Key Prediction Test",
       x = NULL, y = "Log-Fold Change") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  guides(fill = "none")

# Save plots
ggsave(file.path(output_dir,"functional_groups_all.pdf"), plot_functional_groups, 
       width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "suspension_mechanisms.pdf"), plot_suspension, 
       width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(output_dir,"fdm_vs_ads.pdf"), plot_fdm_ads, 
       width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Combined figure
combined <- (plot_suspension / plot_fdm_ads) | plot_functional_groups
ggsave(file.path(output_dir,"functional_analysis_combined.pdf"), combined, 
       width = 14, height = 10, dpi = 300)

# ============ PART 5: EXPORT RESULTS ============

write.csv(functional_group_summary, file.path(output_dir, "functional_group_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(suspension_summary, file.path(output_dir, "suspension_mechanism_summary.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(photoautotroph_analysis, file.path(output_dir, "photoautotroph_subgroups.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

cat("\n=== ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("Functional groups analyzed:", nrow(functional_group_summary), "\n")
cat("Suspension mechanisms tested:", nrow(suspension_summary), "\n")
cat("Results exported to CSV files and PDF figures\n")
```


```{r vertical phylum LFC plots, all fractions}

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

cat("=== CREATING CLEAN PHYLUM LFC PLOTS ===\n\n")

# Get phylum-level turbidity effects
phylum_turb <- all_environmental_significant %>%
  filter(Taxonomic_Level == "Phylum" & Environmental_Variable == "Turbidity")

# Custom colors
color_increase <- "#3B8C6E"  # Green for increases
color_decrease <- "#F68C30"  # Orange for decreases

# ALL SAMPLES
all_phyla <- phylum_turb %>%
  filter(Fraction == "All_Samples") %>%
  arrange(Log_Fold_Change) %>%
  mutate(
    Phylum_ordered = factor(Taxon, levels = Taxon),
    Direction = ifelse(Log_Fold_Change > 0, "Increases_with_turbidity", "Decreases_with_turbidity")
  )

if(nrow(all_phyla) > 0) {
  cat("\n=== ALL SAMPLES ===\n")
  cat("Phyla found:", nrow(all_phyla), "\n")
  print(all_phyla %>% select(Taxon, Log_Fold_Change, Q_value, Robust))
  
  p_all <- ggplot(all_phyla, aes(x = Phylum_ordered, y = Log_Fold_Change, fill = Direction)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, width = 0.7) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c(
        "Increases_with_turbidity" = color_increase,
        "Decreases_with_turbidity" = color_decrease
      ),
      name = "",
      labels = c("Decreases with turbidity", "Increases with turbidity")
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "All fractions",
      x = "",
      y = "Log₂ Fold Change"
    ) +
    coord_flip() +  # VERTICAL PLOT
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      # All text black
      text = element_text(color = "black"),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
      axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 11, face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 9),
      
      # Remove gridlines
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      
      # White background
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      
      # Add axis lines
      axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      
      # Legend
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm")
    )
  
  print(p_all)
  
  ggsave("Phylum_LFC_All_Clean_18S.pdf", p_all, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("Phylum_LFC_All_Clean_18S.png", p_all, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 600)
  
  cat("\n✓ All fractions plot saved\n")
}

# MOTILE
motile_phyla <- phylum_turb %>%
  filter(Fraction == "Motile") %>%
  arrange(Log_Fold_Change) %>%
  mutate(
    Phylum_ordered = factor(Taxon, levels = Taxon),
    Direction = ifelse(Log_Fold_Change > 0, "Increases_with_turbidity", "Decreases_with_turbidity")
  )

if(nrow(motile_phyla) > 0) {
  cat("\n=== MOTILE ===\n")
  cat("Phyla found:", nrow(motile_phyla), "\n")
  print(motile_phyla %>% select(Taxon, Log_Fold_Change, Q_value, Robust))
  
  p_motile <- ggplot(motile_phyla, aes(x = Phylum_ordered, y = Log_Fold_Change, fill = Direction)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, width = 0.7) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c(
        "Increases_with_turbidity" = color_increase,
        "Decreases_with_turbidity" = color_decrease
      ),
      name = "",
      labels = c("Decreases with turbidity", "Increases with turbidity")
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Motile fraction",
      x = "",
      y = "Log₂ Fold Change"
    ) +
    coord_flip() +  # VERTICAL PLOT
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      # All text black
      text = element_text(color = "black"),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
      axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 11, face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 9),
      
      # Remove gridlines
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      
      # Add axis lines
      axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      
      # Legend
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm")
    )
  
  print(p_motile)
  
  ggsave("Phylum_LFC_Motile_Clean_18S.pdf", p_motile, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("Phylum_LFC_Motile_Clean_18S.png", p_motile, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 600)
  
  cat("\n✓ Motile plot saved\n")
}

# SESSILE
sessile_phyla <- phylum_turb %>%
  filter(Fraction == "Sessile") %>%
  arrange(Log_Fold_Change) %>%
  mutate(
    Phylum_ordered = factor(Taxon, levels = Taxon),
    Direction = ifelse(Log_Fold_Change > 0, "Increases_with_turbidity", "Decreases_with_turbidity")
  )

if(nrow(sessile_phyla) > 0) {
  cat("\n=== SESSILE ===\n")
  cat("Phyla found:", nrow(sessile_phyla), "\n")
  print(sessile_phyla %>% select(Taxon, Log_Fold_Change, Q_value, Robust))
  
  p_sessile <- ggplot(sessile_phyla, aes(x = Phylum_ordered, y = Log_Fold_Change, fill = Direction)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, width = 0.7) +
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c(
        "Increases_with_turbidity" = color_increase,
        "Decreases_with_turbidity" = color_decrease
      ),
      name = "",
      labels = c("Decreases with turbidity", "Increases with turbidity")
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Sessile fraction",
      x = "",
      y = "Log₂ Fold Change"
    ) +
    coord_flip() +  # VERTICAL PLOT
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      # All text black
      text = element_text(color = "black"),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 10),
      axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 11, face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 9),
      
      # Remove gridlines
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      
      # White background
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      
      # Add axis lines
      axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      
      # Legend
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3),
      legend.key.size = unit(0.5, "cm")
    )
  
  print(p_sessile)
  
  ggsave("Phylum_LFC_Sessile_Clean_18S.pdf", p_sessile, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("Phylum_LFC_Sessile_Clean_18S.png", p_sessile, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 600)
  
  cat("\n✓ Sessile plot saved\n")
}

# SUMMARY
cat("\n==========================================\n")
cat("CLEAN PHYLUM LFC PLOTS COMPLETE!\n")
cat("==========================================\n\n")

cat("Files created:\n")
if(exists("p_all")) cat("1. Phylum_LFC_All_Clean_18S.pdf (All fractions)\n")
if(exists("p_motile")) cat("2. Phylum_LFC_Motile_Clean_18S.pdf (Motile)\n")
if(exists("p_sessile")) cat("3. Phylum_LFC_Sessile_Clean_18S.pdf (Sessile)\n")
```

# COMBINED 18S + COI PHYLUM LFC PLOTS
Creates vertical plots with slashed lines for COI bars
Run this in your 18S R window AFTER exporting COI data
```{r COMBINED 18S + COI PHYLUM LFC PLOTS}
#library(ggplot2)
#library(dplyr)
#library(ggpattern)  # For patterned bars

cat("=== CREATING COMBINED 18S + COI PLOTS ===\n\n")

# Load 18S phylum data (already in environment)
phylum_turb_18S <- all_environmental_significant %>%
  filter(Taxonomic_Level == "Phylum" & Environmental_Variable == "Turbidity") %>%
  mutate(Dataset = "18S rRNA")

# Load COI phylum data (exported from COI window)
phylum_turb_COI <- read.csv("COI_phylum_turbidity_simple.csv")

cat("18S phyla:", nrow(phylum_turb_18S), "\n")
cat("COI phyla:", nrow(phylum_turb_COI), "\n\n")

# Combine both datasets
combined_phylum <- rbind(
  phylum_turb_18S %>% select(Fraction, Taxon, Log_Fold_Change, Q_value, Robust, Direction, Dataset),
  phylum_turb_COI
)

# Custom colors
color_increase <- "#3B8C6E"  # Green
color_decrease <- "#F68C30"  # Orange

# FUNCTION TO CREATE COMBINED PLOT
create_combined_plot <- function(data, fraction_name) {
  
  # Filter to specific fraction
  frac_data <- data %>%
    filter(Fraction == fraction_name) %>%
    arrange(Dataset, Log_Fold_Change) %>%
    mutate(
      # Create a unique ID for each phylum-dataset combination
      Phylum_Dataset = paste0(Taxon, " (", Dataset, ")"),
      Phylum_Dataset_ordered = factor(Phylum_Dataset, levels = unique(Phylum_Dataset)),
      # Simplify direction names
      Direction_simple = ifelse(grepl("Increase", Direction), "Increases_with_turbidity", "Decreases_with_turbidity"),
      # Pattern: solid for 18S, slashed for COI
      Pattern_type = ifelse(Dataset == "18S rRNA", "none", "stripe")
    )
  
  if(nrow(frac_data) == 0) {
    cat("No data for", fraction_name, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  cat("\n", fraction_name, ":\n", sep = "")
  cat("  Total entries:", nrow(frac_data), "\n")
  cat("  18S phyla:", sum(frac_data$Dataset == "18S rRNA"), "\n")
  cat("  COI phyla:", sum(frac_data$Dataset == "COI"), "\n")
  
  # Create plot with ggpattern
  p <- ggplot(frac_data, aes(x = Phylum_Dataset_ordered, y = Log_Fold_Change, 
                             fill = Direction_simple, pattern = Pattern_type)) +
    
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
    
    # Use geom_bar_pattern for patterned bars
    ggpattern::geom_bar_pattern(
      stat = "identity",
      color = "black",
      linewidth = 0.3,
      width = 0.7,
      pattern_fill = "black",
      pattern_angle = 45,
      pattern_density = 0.1,
      pattern_spacing = 0.025,
      pattern_key_scale_factor = 0.6
    ) +
    
    scale_pattern_manual(values = c("none" = "none", "stripe" = "stripe"), guide = "none") +
    
    scale_fill_manual(
      values = c(
        "Increases_with_turbidity" = color_increase,
        "Decreases_with_turbidity" = color_decrease
      ),
      name = "",
      labels = c("Decreases with turbidity", "Increases with turbidity")
    ) +
    
    labs(
      title = paste0(fraction_name, " fraction - 18S rRNA + COI"),
      subtitle = "Solid bars = 18S rRNA; Striped bars = COI",
      x = "",
      y = "Log₂ Fold Change"
    ) +
    
    coord_flip() +
    
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      # All text black
      text = element_text(color = "black"),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 9),
      axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 11, face = "bold"),
      plot.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "black", size = 9, hjust = 0.5),
      legend.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 9),
      
      # Remove gridlines
      panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      
      # White background
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      
      # Axis lines
      axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
      
      # Legend
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black", linewidth = 0.3)
    )
  
  return(list(plot = p, data = frac_data))
}

# Create plots for each fraction
cat("\n=== CREATING PLOTS ===\n")

# ALL SAMPLES
all_result <- create_combined_plot(combined_phylum, "All_Samples")
if(!is.null(all_result)) {
  print(all_result$plot)
  ggsave("Combined_18S_COI_Phylum_All.pdf", all_result$plot, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("Combined_18S_COI_Phylum_All.png", all_result$plot, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 600)
  cat("✓ All samples saved\n")
}

# MOTILE
motile_result <- create_combined_plot(combined_phylum, "Motile")
if(!is.null(motile_result)) {
  print(motile_result$plot)
  ggsave("Combined_18S_COI_Phylum_Motile.pdf", motile_result$plot, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("Combined_18S_COI_Phylum_Motile.png", motile_result$plot, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 600)
  cat("✓ Motile saved\n")
}

# SESSILE
sessile_result <- create_combined_plot(combined_phylum, "Sessile")
if(!is.null(sessile_result)) {
  print(sessile_result$plot)
  ggsave("Combined_18S_COI_Phylum_Sessile.pdf", sessile_result$plot, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
  ggsave("Combined_18S_COI_Phylum_Sessile.png", sessile_result$plot, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 600)
  cat("✓ Sessile saved\n")
}

# Save combined data for reference
write.csv(combined_phylum, "Combined_18S_COI_phylum_data.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```



# --------------- EXPLORATORY POST-HOC ANALYSIS: PHOTOAUTOTROPH SUBGROUPS --------------
```{r photoautotroph exploration}
# Define coralline families (calcified crustose forms)
coralline_families <- c("Hapalidiaceae", "Mesophyllumaceae", "Lithophyllaceae", 
                        "Corallinaceae", "Sporolithaceae")

# Create subgroup classification
photoautotroph_subgroups <- functional_dataset %>%
  filter(is_photoautotroph == 1, as.logical(Is_Significant), 
         Fraction == "All_Samples") %>%
  mutate(
    algal_subgroup = case_when(
      Taxon %in% coralline_families ~ "Coralline_Algae",
      TRUE ~ "Fleshy_Algae"
    )
  )

# Calculate subgroup statistics
subgroup_stats <- photoautotroph_subgroups %>%
  group_by(algal_subgroup) %>%
  summarise(
    n_families = n(),
    mean_lfc = mean(Log_Fold_Change),
    median_lfc = median(Log_Fold_Change),
    sd_lfc = sd(Log_Fold_Change),
    se_lfc = sd_lfc / sqrt(n_families),
    n_increase = sum(Direction == "Increases_with_turbidity"),
    n_decrease = sum(Direction == "Decreases_with_turbidity"),
    percent_decrease = round(n_decrease / n_families * 100, 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("=== EXPLORATORY SUBGROUP ANALYSIS ===\n")
print(subgroup_stats)

# Statistical comparison between subgroups
welch_test <- t.test(
  Log_Fold_Change ~ algal_subgroup,
  data = photoautotroph_subgroups
)

cat("\nWelch's t-test (Coralline vs Fleshy):\n")
cat("t =", round(welch_test$statistic, 3), "\n")
cat("df =", round(welch_test$parameter, 2), "\n")
cat("p-value =", format.pval(welch_test$p.value, digits = 3), "\n")
cat("Mean difference =", round(diff(welch_test$estimate), 3), "\n")

# Test each subgroup against zero
coralline_test <- t.test(
  photoautotroph_subgroups %>% 
    filter(algal_subgroup == "Coralline_Algae") %>% 
    pull(Log_Fold_Change)
)

fleshy_test <- t.test(
  photoautotroph_subgroups %>% 
    filter(algal_subgroup == "Fleshy_Algae") %>% 
    pull(Log_Fold_Change)
)

cat("\nOne-sample tests (against zero):\n")
cat("Coralline: t =", round(coralline_test$statistic, 3), 
    ", p =", format.pval(coralline_test$p.value, digits = 3), "\n")
cat("Fleshy: t =", round(fleshy_test$statistic, 3), 
    ", p =", format.pval(fleshy_test$p.value, digits = 3), "\n")

# Create visualization
subgroup_plot <- photoautotroph_subgroups %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = algal_subgroup, y = Log_Fold_Change, fill = algal_subgroup)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.3, trim = TRUE) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = Direction), width = 0.2, size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", size = 0.8) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", size = 4, shape = 23, 
               fill = "black", color = "black") +
  stat_summary(fun.data = mean_se, geom = "errorbar", width = 0.2, 
               size = 1, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Coralline_Algae" = "#F16363", 
                               "Fleshy_Algae" = "#F69B9C")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Increases_with_turbidity" = "#3B8C6E",
                                "Decreases_with_turbidity" = "#F68C30")) +
  labs(
    title = "Exploratory Post-Hoc Analysis: Photoautotroph Subgroups",
    subtitle = paste0("Welch's t-test: p = ", 
                     format.pval(welch_test$p.value, digits = 2)),
    x = NULL,
    y = "Log-Fold Change (Turbidity Effect)",
    color = "Response Direction"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  guides(fill = "none")

print(subgroup_plot)

# Export
ggsave("photoautotroph_subgroup_exploratory.pdf", subgroup_plot, 
       width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

# FUNCTIONAL COMPOSITION ANALYSIS - UPDATED WITH MECHANISTIC CATEGORIES
Uses revised 6 suspension feeder mechanisms + other functional groups
```{r functional composition analysis}

#library(dplyr)
#library(ggplot2)
#library(tidyr)
#library(stringr)
#library(phyloseq)
#library(patchwork)

# ============ SETUP: COLOR SCHEMES AND SITE ORDER ============

# Site colors (unchanged)
c12_sites <- c("Alderdice_deep1" = "#0E4077", "Alderdice_deep2" = "#0E4077",
               "Alderdice_shallow" = "#9DC9D3", "Bright_deep1" = "#3B8C6E",
               "Bright_deep2" = "#3B8C6E", "Bright_shallow" = "#B0DBBB",
               "Diaphus_deep2" = "#996599", "Diaphus_deep1" = "#996599",
               "EFGB_deep" = "#F68C30", "EFGB_shallow" = "#FEBC2C",
               "McGrail_deep" = "#015951", "Stetson_shallow" = "#FF595E")

# UPDATED: Functional group colors matching new categories
functional_colors <- c(
  "PHOT" = "#F16363",     # Photoautotrophs (Rhodophyta)
  "FDM" = "#F68C30",      # Fine Dead-End Microfilterers (Porifera)
  "ADS" = "#3B8C6E",      # Active Dead-End Sieves
  "WCP" = "#5BBFB0",      # Weak Ciliary Pumpers (Bryozoa)
  "TPC" = "#A8B1D6",      # Truly Passive Collectors
  "RNM" = "#408BA8",      # Renewable Mucus Nets (Ascidians)
  "RCF" = "#408BA8",      # Ram/Crossflow (fish)
  "DEP" = "#60714E",      # Deposit Feeders
  "PRED" = "#594A9E",     # Predators
  "GRAZ" = "#F69B9C",     # Grazers
  "SCAV" = "#C74238",     # Scavengers
  "PARA" = "#812A5A",     # Parasites
  "UNK" = "grey70"        # Unclassified
)

# Site order (high to low turbidity)
turb_ordered_sites <- c("McGrail_deep", "EFGB_shallow", "Alderdice_shallow", 
                        "Bright_shallow", "Diaphus_deep2", "EFGB_deep", 
                        "Diaphus_deep1", "Bright_deep2", "Bright_deep1", 
                        "Alderdice_deep1", "Stetson_shallow", "Alderdice_deep2")

# ============ 1. USE CLEANED TRAIT DATA FROM PREVIOUS ANALYSIS ============

# This assumes you've already run the main functional analysis
# and have trait_data_v4_cleaned_unique available

# If not, load and clean:
if(!exists("trait_data_v4_cleaned_unique")) {
  source("path_to_trait_cleaning_script.R")
}

# Create primary function using the updated classification
functional_dataset_updated <- trait_data_v4_cleaned_unique %>%
  mutate(
    # Determine primary function based on trait and phylum
    primary_function_abbr = case_when(
      # Photoautotrophs first
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Photoautotroph") ~ "PHOT",
      phyllum == "Rhodophyta" ~ "PHOT",  # Changed from final_phylum
      
      # Suspension feeders by mechanism
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Fine_Dead_End_Microfilterer") ~ "FDM",
      phyllum == "Porifera" ~ "FDM",  # Changed from final_phylum
      
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Active_Dead-End_Sieve") ~ "ADS",
      
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Weak_Ciliary_Pumper") ~ "WCP",
      phyllum == "Bryozoa" ~ "WCP",  # Changed from final_phylum
      
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Truly_Passive_Collectors") ~ "TPC",
      
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Renewable_Mucus_Net") ~ "RNM",
      
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Ram/Crossflow") ~ "RCF",
      
      # Other feeding strategies
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Deposit_Feeder") ~ "DEP",
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Predator") ~ "PRED",
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Grazer") ~ "GRAZ",
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Scavenger") ~ "SCAV",
      str_detect(nutritional_strategy_full, "Parasite") ~ "PARA",
      
      TRUE ~ "UNK"
    )
  )

# ============ 2. EXTRACT AND PREPARE PHYLOSEQ DATA ============

cat("Extracting data from phyloseq object...\n")

family_site_abundances <- ancom_physeq %>%
  tax_glom(taxrank = "family") %>%
  psmelt() %>%
  mutate(family_clean = tolower(trimws(family)))

cat("Families found:", length(unique(family_site_abundances$family_clean)), "\n")

# ============ 3. JOIN WITH FUNCTIONAL TRAITS ============

functional_site_data <- family_site_abundances %>%
  left_join(
    functional_dataset_updated %>% 
      dplyr::select(family_clean, primary_function_abbr) %>% 
      distinct(),
    by = "family_clean"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    # Replace NA with UNK for unassigned families
    primary_function_abbr = ifelse(is.na(primary_function_abbr), "UNK", primary_function_abbr)
  )

cat("Families with trait assignments:", 
    sum(functional_site_data$primary_function_abbr != "UNK"), "/",
    nrow(functional_site_data), "\n")

# ============ 4. CALCULATE FUNCTIONAL COMPOSITION BY SITE ============

functional_composition <- functional_site_data %>%
  group_by(sitelocality, primary_function_abbr) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    turbidity_std_rank = first(turbidity_std_rank),
    group_abundance = sum(Abundance),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(sitelocality) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_abundance = sum(group_abundance),
    Proportion = group_abundance / total_abundance * 100
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(sitelocality, turbidity_std_rank, primary_function_abbr, Proportion) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = primary_function_abbr, 
              values_from = Proportion, 
              values_fill = 0) %>%
  rename(Site = sitelocality, Turbidity = turbidity_std_rank)

# Verify proportions sum to 100%
check_totals <- functional_composition %>%
  dplyr::select(-Site, -Turbidity) %>%
  rowSums()

cat("All sites sum to 100%:", all(abs(check_totals - 100) < 0.01), "\n")

# ============ 5. RESHAPE FOR PLOTTING ============

composition_long <- functional_composition %>%
  dplyr::select(-Turbidity) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Site, 
               names_to = "Functional_Group", 
               values_to = "Proportion") %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Functional_Group), Functional_Group != "NA") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Site = factor(Site, levels = turb_ordered_sites),
    # Order groups: photoautotrophs, suspension feeders, then others
    Functional_Group = factor(Functional_Group, 
                             levels = c("PHOT", "FDM", "ADS", "WCP", "TPC", "RNM", "RCF",
                                      "DEP", "PRED", "GRAZ", "SCAV", "PARA", "UNK"))
  )

# ============ 6. CREATE MULTI-PANEL FIGURE ============

cat("\nGenerating figure panels...\n")

# PANEL A: Stacked bar chart
p1 <- ggplot(composition_long, aes(x = Site, y = Proportion, fill = Functional_Group)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", color = "white", size = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = functional_colors, 
                   name = "Functional Group",
                   labels = c("PHOT" = "Photoautotroph",
                            "FDM" = "Fine Dead-End Microfilterer",
                            "ADS" = "Active Dead-End Sieve",
                            "WCP" = "Weak Ciliary Pumper",
                            "TPC" = "Truly Passive Collector",
                            "RNM" = "Renewable Mucus Net",
                            "RCF" = "Ram/Crossflow",
                            "DEP" = "Deposit Feeder",
                            "PRED" = "Predator",
                            "GRAZ" = "Grazer",
                            "SCAV" = "Scavenger",
                            "PARA" = "Parasite",
                            "UNK" = "Unclassified")) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) gsub("_", "\n", x)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Relative Abundance (%)", 
       title = "A) Functional Composition Across Turbidity Gradient") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 9),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11)
  )

# PANEL B: Functional richness vs turbidity
functional_richness <- composition_long %>%
  filter(Proportion > 1) %>%
  mutate(Site = as.character(Site)) %>%  # Convert factor to character
  group_by(Site) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(Richness = n()) %>%
  left_join(
    functional_composition %>% 
      mutate(Site = as.character(Site)) %>%  # Convert to character
      dplyr::select(Site, Turbidity) %>%
      dplyr::rename(Turbidity_value = Turbidity),
    by = "Site"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Site = factor(Site, levels = turb_ordered_sites))

p2 <- ggplot(functional_richness, aes(x = Turbidity_value, y = Richness)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = Site), size = 4, shape = 21, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c12_sites) +
  scale_x_reverse(limits = c(12, 0)) +  # Reversed limits for reversed scale
  labs(x = "Turbidity (NTU)", y = "Functional Group Richness",
       title = "B) Functional Diversity Decline") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11))

# PANEL C - with character conversion
key_groups <- composition_long %>%
  filter(Functional_Group %in% c("FDM", "ADS", "PHOT")) %>%
  mutate(Site = as.character(Site)) %>%
  left_join(
    functional_composition %>% 
      mutate(Site = as.character(Site)) %>%
      dplyr::select(Site, Turbidity) %>%
      dplyr::rename(Turbidity_value = Turbidity),
    by = "Site"
  )

p3 <- ggplot(key_groups, aes(x = Turbidity_value, y = Proportion, color = Functional_Group)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = TRUE, alpha = 0.2, size = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.7) +
  scale_color_manual(values = functional_colors, 
                     name = "Functional Group",
                     labels = c("FDM" = "FDM (Sponges)",
                              "ADS" = "ADS (Bivalves/Barnacles)",
                              "PHOT" = "Photoautotrophs")) +
  scale_x_reverse(limits = c(12, 0)) +  # Corrected
  labs(x = "Turbidity (NTU)", y = "Relative Abundance (%)",
       title = "C) Key Groups: Predicted vs Observed") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11))

# PANEL D - with character conversion
functional_shannon <- composition_long %>%
  mutate(Site = as.character(Site)) %>%
  group_by(Site) %>%
  mutate(p = Proportion / 100) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(Shannon = -sum(p * log(p + 1e-10), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  left_join(
    functional_composition %>% 
      mutate(Site = as.character(Site)) %>%
      dplyr::select(Site, Turbidity) %>%
      dplyr::rename(Turbidity_value = Turbidity),
    by = "Site"
  ) %>%
  mutate(Site = factor(Site, levels = turb_ordered_sites))

p4 <- ggplot(functional_shannon, aes(x = Turbidity_value, y = Shannon)) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "black", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = Site), size = 4, shape = 21, color = "black") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c12_sites) +
  scale_x_reverse(limits = c(12, 0)) +  # Corrected
  labs(x = "Turbidity (NTU)", y = "Shannon Diversity (H')",
       title = "D) Functional Evenness Loss") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11))


# Now combine and print
combined_figure <- (p1 | (p2 / p4)) / p3 +
  plot_layout(heights = c(1.2, 1))

print(combined_figure)

# Save figure
ggsave(file.path(output_dir, "functional_composition_updated.pdf"), 
       combined_figure, width = 14, height = 10, units = "in")

# ============ 7. SUMMARY STATISTICS ============

# === SUMMARY STATISTICS ===

# Correlation tests - use Turbidity_value
cor_richness <- cor.test(functional_richness$Turbidity_value, functional_richness$Richness)
cat("Functional richness vs turbidity:\n")
cat("  r =", round(cor_richness$estimate, 3), "\n")
cat("  p =", format.pval(cor_richness$p.value, digits = 3), "\n\n")

cor_shannon <- cor.test(functional_shannon$Turbidity_value, functional_shannon$Shannon)
cat("Functional diversity vs turbidity:\n")
cat("  r =", round(cor_shannon$estimate, 3), "\n")
cat("  p =", format.pval(cor_shannon$p.value, digits = 3), "\n\n")

# Mean proportions by turbidity category - also use Turbidity_value
functional_by_turbidity <- functional_composition %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Site = as.character(Site),
    Turbidity_value = Turbidity  # Create this column if using original Turbidity
  ) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(Turbidity_Category = ifelse(Turbidity_value > 6, "High", "Low")) %>%
  group_by(Turbidity_Category) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(
    across(any_of(c("PHOT", "FDM", "ADS", "WCP", "DEP")),
           ~ mean(., na.rm = TRUE)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("Mean functional composition by turbidity category:\n")
print(functional_by_turbidity)

# Export composition data
write.csv(functional_composition, 
          file.path(output_dir, "functional_composition_by_site.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
```


```{r}
# Check phylum composition of PHOT
phot_phyla <- functional_dataset %>%
  dplyr::filter(is_photoautotroph == 1, as.logical(Is_Significant), Fraction == "All_Samples") %>%
  dplyr::count(final_phylum) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(desc(n))

print(phot_phyla)
```
